prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your travel planning forward
items: Define your travel goals and must-have experiences for this trip
Research and document visa requirements and travel restrictions for your destination
Create a comprehensive travel budget breakdown including all major expense categories
Research and book essential travel insurance coverage for your trip
Research and identify 5 reliable information sources about your destination
Create a detailed day-by-day itinerary outline with travel times between locations
